# v2.2.1

## Changed
- Updated for Minecraft 26.2 (final). The earlier 2.2.0 build targeted the 26.2 release candidate and will not load on 26.2 final — update to this version.

## Added
- NeoForge builds for 26.2 (on NeoForge `26.2.0.0-beta`); the release-candidate builds were Fabric-only while NeoForged had not yet shipped a 26.2 build.
